tasks.label: Build: Compile All (Client + Server + Extensions)
tasks.detail: Compiles all modules: qtClient, qtServer, qtExt using Makefile.

tasks.label: Build: Compile Client Only
tasks.detail: Compiles only qtClient module.

tasks.label: Build: Compile Server Only
tasks.detail: Compiles only qtServer module.

tasks.label: Build: Compile Extensions Only
tasks.detail: Compiles only qtExt (test suite and utilities).

tasks.label: Build: Compile GUI (Maven)
tasks.detail: Compiles qtGUI using Maven.

tasks.label: Build: Compile Active File (Standalone)
tasks.detail: Compiles the currently active file standalone (for quick testing).

tasks.label: Build: Compile Active File with Classpath (Server)
tasks.detail: Compiles active file with server classpath (including MySQL driver).

tasks.label: Run: Client (Prompt for IP and Port)
tasks.detail: Compiles and runs qtClient. Prompts for server IP and port.

tasks.label: Run: Server (Prompt for Port)
tasks.detail: Compiles and runs qtServer. Prompts for port number.

tasks.label: Run: GUI (JavaFX)
tasks.detail: Runs qtGUI using Maven javafx:run.

tasks.label: Run: Client from JAR
tasks.detail: Creates and runs client JAR. Prompts for server IP and port.

tasks.label: Run: Server from JAR
tasks.detail: Creates and runs server JAR. Prompts for port number.

tasks.label: Run: Active File (Standalone)
tasks.detail: Compiles and runs the currently active file standalone.

tasks.label: Test: Run All Test Suites
tasks.detail: Runs complete test suite (distance, QT, cluster, data).

tasks.label: Test: Distance Calculations
tasks.detail: Tests distance calculation algorithms (Hamming, Euclidean).

tasks.label: Test: QT Algorithm
tasks.detail: Tests Quality Threshold clustering algorithm.

tasks.label: Test: Cluster Operations
tasks.detail: Tests cluster creation, modification, and analysis.

tasks.label: Test: Data Operations
tasks.detail: Tests data loading, parsing, and manipulation.

tasks.label: Test: Iterators and Comparators
tasks.detail: Tests custom iterators and comparators.

tasks.label: Test: Continuous Attributes (Interactive)
tasks.detail: Interactive test for continuous attribute handling.

tasks.label: JAR: Create All JARs
tasks.detail: Creates qtClient.jar, qtServer.jar, and qtGUI JAR.

tasks.label: JAR: Create Client JAR
tasks.detail: Creates qtClient.jar executable.

tasks.label: JAR: Create Server JAR
tasks.detail: Creates qtServer.jar executable.

tasks.label: JAR: Create GUI JAR (Maven)
tasks.detail: Creates qtGUI JAR using Maven package.

tasks.label: Docs: Generate All JavaDoc
tasks.detail: Generates comprehensive JavaDoc for all modules.

tasks.label: Docs: Generate Client JavaDoc
tasks.detail: Generates JavaDoc for qtClient only.

tasks.label: Docs: Generate Server JavaDoc
tasks.detail: Generates JavaDoc for qtServer only.

tasks.label: Docs: Generate Extensions JavaDoc
tasks.detail: Generates JavaDoc for qtExt only.

tasks.label: Docs: Generate GUI JavaDoc
tasks.detail: Generates JavaDoc for qtGUI using Maven.

tasks.label: UML: Generate All Diagrams (SVG + PNG)
tasks.detail: Generates all PlantUML diagrams in both SVG and PNG formats.

tasks.label: UML: Generate SVG Diagrams
tasks.detail: Generates PlantUML diagrams in SVG format only.

tasks.label: UML: Generate PNG Diagrams
tasks.detail: Generates PlantUML diagrams in PNG format only.

tasks.label: UML: List All PlantUML Files
tasks.detail: Lists all .puml files found in the project.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean All Compiled Files
tasks.detail: Removes all compiled files, JARs, JavaDoc, and UML diagrams.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean Client Only
tasks.detail: Removes qtClient compiled files only.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean Server Only
tasks.detail: Removes qtServer compiled files only.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean Extensions Only
tasks.detail: Removes qtExt compiled files only.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean GUI (Maven)
tasks.detail: Cleans qtGUI build using Maven clean.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean JAR Files
tasks.detail: Removes all JAR files.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean JavaDoc
tasks.detail: Removes generated JavaDoc documentation.

tasks.label: Clean: Clean UML Diagrams
tasks.detail: Removes generated UML diagrams.

tasks.label: Clean: Rebuild Project from Scratch
tasks.detail: Cleans and recompiles the entire project.

tasks.label: Validate: Check Project Structure
tasks.detail: Validates project structure and checks for required tools.

tasks.label: Validate: Check Dependencies
tasks.detail: Verifies Java, javac, jar, and other dependencies.

tasks.label: Package: Create Distribution Package
tasks.detail: Creates complete distribution package with binaries, docs, and sources.

tasks.label: Info: Show Project Information
tasks.detail: Displays comprehensive project information and status.

tasks.label: Info: List All Source Files
tasks.detail: Lists all Java source files in the project.
